StmtSimple.StatementText: select group_id, replica_id, role,operational_state,recovery_health,synchronization_health,connected_state, last_connect_error_number,last_connect_error_description, last_connect_error_timestamp into #tmpar_availability_replica_states from master.sys.dm_hadr_availability_replica_states

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [Union1017] IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Union1015] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Union1017]=(0) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END END

CASE WHEN [Expr1019]=(4) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[connected_state]=(1) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [Union1016] IS NULL AND [Expr1037] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(1) AND [Union1015]=(0) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1036] IS NOT NULL AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Expr1036] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1037] IS NOT NULL THEN [Expr1037] ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(0) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[configured_database_count]>[Union1015] THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_internal]=(1) AND DM_HADR_INTERNAL_AVAILABILITY_REPLICA_STATES.[is_local]=(1) AND [Expr1046] IS NOT NULL THEN [Expr1046] ELSE [Union1016] END END END END END END END
CASE WHEN [master].[sys].[sysguidrefs].[guid] as [sgr2].[guid] IS NULL THEN DM_HADR_INTERNAL_WSFC_AG_REPLICAS.[ag_replica_id] ELSE [master].[sys].[sysguidrefs].[guid] as [sgr2].[guid] END
